subcodes.first_line: O servant! Hearken unto the call of this bondsman, who hath sacrificed his spirit in the path of God, the Omnipotent, the Mighty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا عبد اسمع ندآء هذا العبد الذی انفق روحه فی سبیل الله المهیمن العزیز
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @fellowship with the wayward and ungodly, @importance of reading the Sacred Writings, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
